working_on: Author ADR 0091 (engine-memory substrate SQLite+FTS5; supersedes ADR 0090) + cascade announce. First session of the 6-session MemPalace removal rollout per plan ~/.claude/plans/mempalace-overhead-is-dragging-twinkly-harp.md.

next_session_handle: S-0189 — Engine-memory schema + foundations package per Issue #138 + approved plan ~/.claude/plans/mempalace-overhead-is-dragging-twinkly-harp.md. Build session. Deliverables: new engine/memory/ package (schema.py idempotent CREATE…IF NOT EXISTS for 5 tables + drawers_fts FTS5 + triggers + schema_version seed; connection.py stdlib sqlite3 + WAL + PRAGMA foreign_keys=ON + busy_timeout=5000 + exp function fallback registration + path resolution via ENGINE_MEMORY_PATH or git rev-parse; mcp_server.py skeleton; README.md). engine/.memory/.gitkeep.
